tests.name: extension/export/symbols/build/paths sorts file-backed items by file path without mutating the input array
extension/export/symbols/build/paths resolves exact export file paths after normalizing path separators
extension/export/symbols/build/paths prefers an exact export-path match over a suffix-only candidate
extension/export/symbols/build/paths resolves nested absolute paths to the exported path suffix and falls back to normalized paths
graphView/files/visits/counts returns zero when a file has not been visited yet
graphView/files/visits/counts returns the persisted visit count for a file
graphView/files/visits/counts increments visit counts for new files
graphView/files/visits/counts increments visit counts for previously visited files
extension/export/symbols/build/counts counts symbols by file path
extension/export/symbols/build/counts counts relations for both files only when the target file differs
extension/export/symbols/build/counts creates file entries with zero counts when a file has no symbols or relations
